title: agrimonia pilosa var. zeylanica
intro: Agrimonia pilosa var. zeylanica, also known as the Sri Lankan agrimonia, is a plant species within the family Rosaceae, closely related to the agrimonia eupatoria. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Agrimonia pilosa var. zeylanica include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and menstrual disorders, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
